Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.core
  2. BoundHashOperations

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.core.BoundHashOperations

Packages that use BoundHashOperations
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections
Package providing implementations for most of the java.util collections on top of Redis.

    Method
    Description
    <HK,HV> @NonNull BoundHashOperations<K,HK,HV>
    RedisOperations.boundHashOps(@NonNull K key)
    Returns the operations performed on hash values bound to the given key.
    <HK,HV> BoundHashOperations<K,HK,HV>
